meaning: n.摩洛族(居住在菲律宾南部,多为伊斯兰教教徒,以制造武器闻名),摩洛语
examples: In children, assessment of infantile reflexes is also a diagnostic tool, such as the Moro reflex and the Romberg Test.
We talk, I believe, all day long, to talk to each other is but a moro animated and an audible thinking.
Emilio Moro is nowadays one of the most prestigious vineyards in Spain, many of its wines are rated over 90 points by the wine Advocate.
Marrone believes Cerro Moro has the potential to increase cash flows substantially by early 2016.
Located in the province of Santa Cruz, Argentina, Yamana is looking to move Cerro Moro into production start-up in 2015.
